context: The CSV has a valid header but every data row has an empty company name. parse-attendees.py exits non-zero with ok=false in its stderr summary. The skill must refuse to initialize the batch and surface the dropped-rows count rather than creating an empty run directory.

checklist.name: No batch-manifest.json written
checklist.description: No batch-manifest.json file was created. The skill stopped at the parse step rather than proceeding to Step 2.

checklist.name: No per-company runs initiated
checklist.description: No company subdirectories under runs/ were created during this invocation. The skill did not loop into discovery for non-existent companies.

checklist.name: Dropped-row count surfaced
checklist.description: The agent's response reports the number of dropped rows and the empty-company reason (or surfaces the parse-attendees.py stderr summary verbatim).

checklist.name: Actionable next step suggested
checklist.description: The agent suggests an actionable next step (e.g., 'fix the CSV', 'check the company column header', 'verify the source export') rather than just reporting the failure.

checklist.name: Finishes cleanly
checklist.description: The agent does not retry, loop, or invent synthetic company names to keep the batch going.
